description: Baseline documentation-debt report for case-study structure, state linkage, and integrity-cycle readiness.

integrity_cycle.notes: Point-in-time debt metrics are usable immediately. Trend analysis waits for multiple scheduled 72h cycle snapshots; ad hoc local snapshots do not unlock trend mode.

debt_items.title: Case studies missing a written-date marker
debt_items.recommended_next_step: Touch the missing files opportunistically and add the missing date written field explicitly.

debt_items.title: Case studies missing explicit work-type metadata
debt_items.recommended_next_step: Touch the missing files opportunistically and add the missing work type field explicitly.

debt_items.title: Case studies missing explicit dispatch-pattern declaration
debt_items.recommended_next_step: Touch the missing files opportunistically and add the missing dispatch pattern field explicitly.

debt_items.title: Case studies missing success-metric restatement
debt_items.recommended_next_step: Touch the missing files opportunistically and add the missing success metrics field explicitly.

debt_items.title: Features missing case-study linkage in state.json
debt_items.recommended_next_step: Backfill case-study linkage or an explicit case_study_type marker when feature state is touched.

debt_items.title: Case studies declaring kill_criteria but missing kill_criteria_resolution (FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS Q7, advisory in v7.8)
debt_items.recommended_next_step: ADVISORY (v7.8 forward-only): if you author a NEW case study post-2026-05-07 with kill_criteria, also set kill_criteria_resolution. Existing case studies are grandfathered until v7.9 promotion may opt to backfill.
